nasb.text: Then your maidservant said, ‘Please let the word of my lord the king be comforting, for as the angel of God, so is my lord the king to discern good and evil. And may the Lord your God be with you.’ ”

esv.text: And your servant thought, ‘The word of my lord the king will set me at rest,’ for my lord the king is like the angel of God to discern good and evil. The Lord your God be with you!”

cnv.text: 婢女又想：‘我主我王的話必能使我得安慰，因為我主我王像　神的使者一樣，能分辨是非。願耶和華你的　神與你同在。’”

ccb.text: 婢女想，我主我王的话必能安慰我，因为我主我王就像上帝的天使一样能明辨是非。愿王的上帝耶和华常与王同在！”
